Sun Exposure 
 
Direct sunlight may raise the operating temperature of the optoelectronic hardware beyond 
acceptable limits and may also impose excessive optical noise. Installations which would 
normally expose the PFMD to direct sunlight will need to erect a sunshade.

Please follow these safety precautions to avoid injury and prevent damage to the PFMD. 
• 
• 
• 
• 
Use this product only as specified. 
Only qualified personnel should perform service. 
Use only the power cord specified for this product and certified for the country of use. 
The PFMD is grounded through the grounding conductor in the power cord. To avoid electric 
shock, the grounding conductor must be connected to earth ground.

Consumption 60W, maximum 
Ambient 
Temperature 
• Operational: 5°C - 45°C 
• Storage: -20°C - 60°C 
Ambient Humidity 0 – 90% RH 
 
Sun Exposure 
 
Direct sunlight may raise the operating temperature of the optoelectronic hardware beyond 
acceptable limits and may also impose excessive optical noise. Installations which would 
normally expose the PFMD to direct sunlight will need to erect a sunshade. 
Moisture 
Resistance* Indoor/outdoor, including capability to sustain high humidity and rain

text_support.text:
Consumption 60W, maximum 
Ambient 
Temperature 
• Operational: 5°C - 45°C 
• Storage: -20°C - 60°C 
Ambient Humidity 0 – 90% RH 
 
Sun Exposure 
 
Direct sunlight may raise the operating temperature of the optoelectronic hardware beyond 
acceptable limits and may also impose excessive optical noise. Installations which would 
normally expose the PFMD to direct sunlight will need to erect a sunshade. 
Moisture 
Resistance* Indoor/outdoor, including capability to sustain high humidity and rain

1. General Safety Precautions 
Please follow these safety precautions to avoid injury and prevent damage to the PFMD. 
• 
• 
• 
• 
Use this product only as specified. 
Only qualified personnel should perform service. 
Use only the power cord specified for this product and certified for the country of use. 
The PFMD is grounded through the grounding conductor in the power cord. To avoid electric 
shock, the grounding conductor must be connected to earth ground. 
Do not operate the PFMD with any c

Consumption 60W, maximum 
Ambient 
Temperature 
• Operational: 5°C - 45°C 
• Storage: -20°C - 60°C 
Ambient Humidity 0 – 90% RH 
 
Sun Exposure 
 
Direct sunlight may raise the operating temperature of the optoelectronic hardware beyond 
acceptable limits and may also impose excessive optical noise. Installations which would 
normally expose the PFMD to direct sunlight will need to erect a sunshade. 
Moisture 
Resistance* Indoor/outdoor, including capability to sustain high humidity and rain

Please follow these safety precautions to avoid injury and prevent damage to the PFMD. 
• 
• 
• 
• 
Use this product only as specified. 
Only qualified personnel should perform service. 
Use only the power cord specified for this product and certified for the country of use. 
The PFMD is grounded through the grounding conductor in the power cord. To avoid electric 
shock, the grounding conductor must be connected to earth ground. 
Do not operate the PFMD with any c

with a threaded tripod mount on the base. 
 
FLOOR 
 
The PFMD may be placed on the floor if that is the optimal vantage point. 
The viewing angle can be adjusted using the tilting mechanism on the front 
face of the device; use the clamping lever to release and secure the tilting 
mechanism (Figure 3). 
CUSTOM Alternatively, the PFMD may be placed on any sturdy surface large enough to 
support the four rubberized feet on the base of the device.

Consumption 60W, maximum 
Ambient 
Temperature 
• Operational: 5°C - 45°C 
• Storage: -20°C - 60°C 
Ambient Humidity 0 – 90% RH 
 
Sun Exposure 
 
Direct sunlight may raise the operating temperature of the optoelectronic hardware beyond 
acceptable limits and may also impose excessive optical noise. Installations which would 
normally expose the PFMD to direct sunlight will need to erect a sunshade. 
Moisture 
Resistance* Indoor/outdoor, including capability to sustain high humidity and rain 
Du

• Smaller targets are likely to be detected 
 
 
Recorded Data 
 
• 3-D position of each unique target, maintaining track continuity across specified active 
region(s) 
o trajectory uncertainty, with respect to other targets, of ±2mm along height and 
width axes and ±5mm along the range axis 
• Apparent size estimate of each unique target

with a threaded tripod mount on the base. 
 
FLOOR 
 
The PFMD may be placed on the floor if that is the optimal vantage point. 
The viewing angle can be adjusted using the tilting mechanism on the front 
face of the device; use the clamping lever to release and secure the tilting 
mechanism (Figure 3). 
CUSTOM Alternatively, the PFMD may be placed on any sturdy surface large enough to 
support the four rubberized feet on the base of the device.

Ambient

• Operational: 5°C - 45°C 
• Storage: -20°C - 60°C 
Ambient Humidity 0 – 90% RH 
 
Sun Exposure 
 
Direct sunlight may raise the operating temperature of the optoelectronic hardware beyond 
acceptable limits and may also impose excessive optical noise. Installations which would 
normally expose the PFMD to direct sunlight will need to erect a sunshade. 
Moisture 
Resistance* Indoor/outdoor, including capability to sustain high humidity and rain

a. The PFMD is delivered in packaging which was designed to keep it safe during transport and 
storage. Please retain this original packaging and use it to transport and store the PFMD when it 
is not being utilized for data collection. 
When carrying the PFMD outside of its packaging, please support it using both handles on the lid 
of the device. The handles can be folded flat against the lid when not in use.
